# Version 4.151.0
> **Skia m151 and performance gains** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.151.0-preview)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.151.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 updates to Skia milestone m151 and ships a series of allocation-reducing performance improvements. This preview advances the bundled Skia engine to m151 and delivers zero-allocation or low-allocation paths for SKColor hex parsing, SKShaper glyph result access, and HarfBuzz UTF-8 encoding. A long-standing WASM build issue is resolved, and an unnecessary `unsafe` block in GRContextOptions is cleaned up.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia updated to milestone m151** — The bundled Skia engine advances to m151, bringing upstream rendering improvements, bug fixes, and platform support updates. ([#4294](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4294))
- **Upstream m151 bug fixes merged** — Additional cherry-picked fixes from the Skia chrome/m151 branch have been merged for improved stability. ([#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312), [#4382](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4382))
- **WASM build fixed by correcting SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition** — A preprocessor redefinition of SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM in the Skia submodule was causing WASM builds to fail; the submodule bump eliminates the conflict. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788))

## API Surface

- **SKColor hex parsing is faster with ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads** — SKColor.Parse and TryParse now accept ReadOnlySpan<char>, and the internal hex decoder is rewritten to avoid allocations on the hot path. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))
- **GRContextOptions no longer requires an unsafe block** — An unnecessary unsafe modifier has been removed from GRContextOptions, making the type safe to use without enabling unsafe code. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))

## Bug Fixes

- **SKShaper glyph results read via zero-copy spans** — SKShaper now reads back glyph IDs, advances, and cluster data through Span-based P/Invoke, eliminating the per-call managed array copies. ([#4388](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4388))
- **SKFourByteTag.Parse allocation removed** — SKFourByteTag.Parse no longer allocates a temporary char[4] on every call; the conversion is now done in-place. ([#4396](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4396))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1

Delivers two allocation-removing performance improvements to HarfBuzzSharp: Buffer.AddUtf8(string) is now allocation-free using a pooled UTF-8 encoder, and Tag.Parse no longer allocates a temporary char[4] per call.

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| Contributor | Contributions |
|-------------|---------------|
| [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) | Fixed the WASM SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition build issue and added a cross-backend golden-image visual regression test harness ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788), [#4340](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4340)) |

## Preview 1 (July 2, 2026)

Preview 1 updated the Skia engine to milestone m151, fixed the WASM submodule build issue, added SKColor span overloads, removed the GRContextOptions unsafe block, and included the initial set of m151 upstream cherry-picks.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.0...v4.151.0-preview.1.1)
